Video.summary: Racing America 24/7 presents special live coverage of the Trans Am Series as they compete in their first of two races at Sonoma. The second race will be Sunday here on the Racing America 24/7 Channel at 10:15 AM PT / 1:15 PM ET. - Coverage of the CUBE 3 ARCHITECTURE TA2 Series continues here at 1 PM PT / 4 PM ET after a break in programming.
Video.grandparentTitle: LIVE - Trans Am Series at Sonoma (CA)
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Racing America 24/7 presents special live coverage of the Trans Am CUBE 3 ARCHITECTURE TA2 Series as they compete in their first of two races at Sonoma. The second race will be Sunday here on the Racing America 24/7 Channel at 1:45 PM PT / 4:45 PM ET. - Coverage of the Trans Am Series continues Sunday here at 10:15 AM PT / 1:15 PM ET.
Video.grandparentTitle: LIVE - Trans Am CUBE 3 ARCHITECTURE TA2 Series at Sonoma (CA)
Video.title: Episode 1
